summary: Tested new Employee Tab (الموظفين) 60/40 split-screen layout in Prayer Areas Daily Log. All major features verified working: coverage map (left 60%), control panel (right 40%), 3 KPI cards, shift filters, search input, uncovered zones alert, zone distribution list. Tab switching between Map/Density/Employees tabs works correctly. Zone edit bug fix (422 error) code verified - toNum/toInt conversion functions added to prevent empty string numeric fields.

issues: SVG text elements (! markers on uncovered zones) intercept pointer events causing hover timeout issues. Tooltip functionality is implemented correctly but hover interaction may be inconsistent on some zones.

employee_tab_layout.split_screen_layout: PASS - 60/40 flex layout working (flex-[3] left, w-[40%] right)

coverage_map_left_side.coverage_map_svg: PASS - data-testid='coverage-map' visible with SVG zones
coverage_map_left_side.zone_polygons: PASS - 60 zone polygons rendered with coverage colors
coverage_map_left_side.green_covered_zones: PASS - Zones with staff show green fill with number badge
coverage_map_left_side.red_uncovered_zones: PASS - Zones without staff show red fill with ! marker

kpi_cards.emp_kpi_1_uncovered: PASS - بدون تغطية (Uncovered) shows value: 59 (red color)

filters_and_search.shift_filter_buttons: PASS - 4 shift filter buttons visible with counts
filters_and_search.employee_search: PASS - data-testid='employee-search' input visible and working

alerts_and_lists.uncovered_zones_alert: PASS - Shows '59 منطقة بدون تغطية' with zone codes list
alerts_and_lists.zone_distribution_list: PASS - 60 zone-staff items visible with staff count badges
alerts_and_lists.all_assigned_message: PASS - 'جميع الموظفين معيّنين' shown when no unassigned employees

tab_switching.map_to_employees: PASS - Tab switch from Map to Employees works
tab_switching.density_to_employees: PASS - Tab switch from Density to Employees works
tab_switching.employees_to_map: PASS - Tab switch from Employees to Map works

zone_edit_bug_fix.code_review: PASS - Dialogs.jsx Lines 306-309: toNum/toInt conversion functions added
zone_edit_bug_fix.fix_description: Empty string numeric fields now convert to null instead of causing 422 validation error

passed_tests.console_errors: PASS - No critical console errors (only CDN analytics logs)

critical_code_review_comments: ZoneEmployeesTab.jsx: Clean 60/40 split layout with flex-[3] (left map) and w-[40%] (right panel)
Coverage map uses SVG with polygon fill colors: green (has staff), red (no staff), gray (service)
Zone hover tooltip implemented with data-testid='coverage-tooltip' but SVG text elements may intercept hover
KPI cards correctly calculate: assignedCount, uncoveredZones.length, coveragePct
Dialogs.jsx Lines 306-309: Bug fix correctly implemented - toNum/toInt functions convert empty strings to null

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Employee Tab features verified working

seed_data_creation: Used existing session data (March 4, 2026 - 60 zones, 1 assigned employee)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41 tested new Employee Tab 60/40 split-screen layout in Prayer Areas. Navigation: 'إدارة المصليات' > 'السجل اليومي للخرائط' > click session > click 'الموظفين' tab. Key data-testids: zone-employees-tab, coverage-map, employees-panel, employee-kpi-grid, emp-kpi-0/1/2, employee-search, zone-staff-{id}, unassigned-emp-{id}. Coverage map shows zones colored by staff coverage (green=covered, red=uncovered, gray=service). Zone edit bug fix verified in Dialogs.jsx (toNum/toInt conversion).
